Package org.eventb.keyboard.tests.ui

Class EventBKeyboardJumpingTestCase

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.keyboard.tests.ui.AbstractKeyboardJumpingTestCase
org.eventb.keyboard.tests.ui.EventBKeyboardJumpingTestCase
public class EventBKeyboardJumpingTestCase extends AbstractKeyboardJumpingTestCase
This class contains some test cases for the Event-B Keyboard translation with dynamic insertions.

It checks keyboard symbols translation on large expressions where text is dynamically inserted (i.e. "jumping").
The text is taken from Prof. Jean-Raymond Abrial's SHWT development.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class org.eventb.keyboard.tests.ui.AbstractKeyboardJumpingTestCase

    context

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventBKeyboardJumpingTestCase()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testBug686Translation()
    Checks that insertion of "r" after "o" is translated to "∨" if substring "or" is already present in the widget string contents.
    void
    testMarkActions()
    Checks that insertion of "=" after ":" is translated to "≔"
    void
    testProg11Actions()
    Checks that insertion of ":" after "=" is translated to "≔" and "/" after "\ {yy} is translated to "∪ {yy}".
    void
    testSHWTInvariant()
    Checks that insertion of ":" after "⊂" is translated to "⊆"
    void
    testTextNoTranslation()
    Checks that insertion of "r" after "o" is not translated to "∨" as it is at the end of the widget string contents.

    Methods inherited from class org.eventb.keyboard.tests.ui.AbstractKeyboardJumpingTestCase

    getTranslatorTester, setUp, tearDown, testJumping, testJumping

  • Method Details

    • testSHWTInvariant

      public void testSHWTInvariant()
      Checks that insertion of ":" after "⊂" is translated to "⊆"

    • testMarkActions

      public void testMarkActions()
      Checks that insertion of "=" after ":" is translated to "≔"

    • testProg11Actions

      public void testProg11Actions()
      Checks that insertion of ":" after "=" is translated to "≔" and "/" after "\ {yy} is translated to "∪ {yy}".

    • testBug686Translation

      public void testBug686Translation()
      Checks that insertion of "r" after "o" is translated to "∨" if substring "or" is already present in the widget string contents.

    • testTextNoTranslation

      public void testTextNoTranslation()
      Checks that insertion of "r" after "o" is not translated to "∨" as it is at the end of the widget string contents.
